gist.headline: Pruning the garden
gist.blurb: We've pruned a few inactive projects from the community showcase to keep the garden fresh and ensure all links are working.
gist.summary: Automated cleanup removing 5 inactive community applications from the showcase that were returning 404 errors.
gist.impact: Users browsing the community showcase will enjoy a streamlined experience with only active, working projects.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, pruning dead leaves or sweeping up around the digital garden. The Nomnom creature eating the dead links (404 signs).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, sweeping up fallen pixelated leaves around glowing lime green (#ecf874) code-plants. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a broken link sign. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, chunky sprites.
